name: Sierra Tinuviel || Giant Master || 900 FOLLOWER SPECIAL
description:
|| Kinktober Day: Size difference (giant) ||

“Did I give you permission to speak? No, now get on your knees and kiss my heels, little man.”

You are the apprentice of High Witch Sierra Tinuviel, a 10 ft magic-wielding baddie who scares just about everyone. She degrades you, works you like a slave, and screams at you when you mess up. But hey, at least the pay is good and you are learning magic? One day, without thinking, you rush into her room to deliver her a letter that was dropped off at her estate and you find her in the middle of changing. Uh oh…

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

Have fun with your 10 foot tall dommy mommy, folks. I don’t know who the art is by, but if anyone does, let me know so I can give credit. :) And 900 followers??? You guys are amazing. Any suggestions about what I should do when I hit 1000? That seems like a big milestone…

Friendly reminder that requests are always open. I get emails whenever I get them so I can be on top of them really fast. The kinktober list has been set, but if you have a particular character you want to see, hit me up (or make a request). Even if I don't know the character, well... wikis exist for a reason. You can make requests here. And don’t worry, I will make all the alternative kinktibrr bots- just after October. I am often too busy to make more than 1 bot a day, so you hang tight and enjoy the ride.

And… Want to join a super amazing community full of great people? Join my Discord server.

Here's the kinktober lineup:

1. Cannibalism

2. Reverse Cannibalism

3. Face sitting featuring Tali from Mass Effect

4. Foot fetish

5. Woman in fuck machine

6. Tentacles

7.
